Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline; distinct scholarly air; temples show grotesque wound with burn marks in chapter opening scene
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s pale male with a scholarly bearing, wearing a halved black top hat and a black Victorian frock coat, frequently using a topaz spirit pendulum on a silver chain
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: graduated from Khoy University; commoner background; four black dots forming a square appeared briefly on the back of his hand after the ritual
Klein Moretti.accessories: silver pocket watch patterned with vine-leaves
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Klein mentally notes that he recently advanced and has yet to completely digest the Seer potion.
Klein Moretti.era_clothing_lock: black Victorian frock coat, halved black top hat, starched white shirt, scholarly bearing
Klein Moretti.unique_identifier: always wears a black top hat split in half (halved top hat) and carries a silver chain with a pure topaz pendulum in his left sleeve

Old Neil.hair_style: white hair, likely short or medium as it fits under a felt hat
Old Neil.visual_anchor: Elderly man in a classic black scholar's robe whose eyes turn pitch-black during ritualistic magic.
Old Neil.distinguishing_features: Lives in a bungalow in the North Borough suburbs; garden contains roses and gold mint; keeps a piano in his living room in memory of his deceased wife.
Old Neil.source_notes: Described as being dressed in a black classic robe.
Old Neil.era_clothing_lock: classic black scholar's robe with silver embroidery, starched white cravat, dark wool trousers

Dunn Smith.primary_clothing: white shirt, black vest, black trench coat, hat
Dunn Smith.face_description: Deep gaze, occasionally shows a slight hook at the corners of his lips when showing amusement
Dunn Smith.visual_anchor: Middle-aged man with deep gray eyes and a black Victorian trench coat, always wearing a unique black top hat that appears split in half.
Dunn Smith.distinguishing_features: gray eyes described as deep and hidden in shadow; leads the Nighthawks; references Mandated Punishers, Machinery Hivemind, and other Judiciaries as peer organizations
Dunn Smith.faction: Church of Evernight — Nighthawk Beyonder team
Dunn Smith.source_notes: Described as wearing a black trench coat, hatless, with gray eyes.

Primordial Demoness.unique_identifier: extremely long violet-black hair that trails along the floor like a living shadow; deep violet eyes with a vertical slit pupil
Primordial Demoness.era_clothing_lock: floor-length deep purple Victorian gown with a black velvet bodice, puffed sleeves of sheer dark silk, elbow-length black gloves, no footwear visible beneath the gown
Primordial Demoness.face_description: Ageless, flawless pale face of unsettling symmetry with high arched brows, sharp angular cheekbones, and full lips the colour of bruised violet. Vertical slit pupils in deep violet irises.
Primordial Demoness.visual_anchor: Ancient ageless pale female entity with violet-slit eyes and floor-length violet-black hair trailing like shadow, wearing a floor-length deep purple Victorian gown with black velvet bodice and sheer dark silk sleeves
Primordial Demoness.color_palette: deep violet, violet-black, pale ivory, shadow black
Primordial Demoness.primary_clothing: deep purple Victorian gown with black velvet bodice
Primordial Demoness.distinguishing_features: slit-pupil violet eyes, hair that trails the floor like a living shadow
Primordial Demoness.source_notes: Mentioned by Alger as a possible true identity of The Fool — an ancient primordial entity. No physical description given; appearance guessed from name and context as a primordial being predating the current gods.

The Creator.primary_clothing: none, body composed of land and stars
The Creator.face_description: A cosmic visage where one eye is a burning sun and the other a blood-red moon, framed by the void of space.
The Creator.visual_anchor: Eternal cosmic being, one eye is the sun and the other is the crimson moon, body merging into the land and stars
The Creator.color_palette: golden yellow, crimson red, deep space black, starlight white
The Creator.distinguishing_features: Eyes are celestial bodies; body is the universe itself
The Creator.source_notes: Mentioned in the creation myth; physical description based on the myth's details.

Tris.primary_clothing: Simple linen shirt, dark vest, worn trousers
Tris.visual_anchor: A shy, unremarkable young man with a round, amiable face and soft features, wearing a simple Victorian wool waistcoat and flat cap.
Tris.color_palette: pale cream, light brown, muted grey
Tris.role: Sequence 8 Instigator, culprit of the Alfalfa tragedy
Tris.source_notes: Described directly in the text when he appears at the harbor.
Tris.unique_identifier: round, amiable face with an unmistakable shy expression; unremarkable boy who retreats to corners
Tris.era_clothing_lock: simple Victorian beige wool waistcoat, white cotton shirt, brown wool trousers, and a modest brown flat cap

Benson Moretti.primary_clothing: linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat
Benson Moretti.face_description: decrepit appearance, resembles Klein but lacks a scholarly air
Benson Moretti.visual_anchor: mid-20s male, pale skin, short black hair, wearing working class Victorian attire, showing signs of fatigue
Benson Moretti.distinguishing_features: literate, employed at an import and export company, resourceful and calculating — negotiated gas pipe installation to avoid debt
Benson Moretti.source_notes: Mentions his weekly salary (1 pound 10 soli) and his goal to study accountancy and grammar.
Benson Moretti.era_clothing_lock: linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat

Melissa Moretti.skin_tone: pale, slightly thin-faced but with lustrous skin
Melissa Moretti.primary_clothing: grayish-white long dress that had been mended several times
Melissa Moretti.visual_anchor: Teenage girl with a focused expression, often tinkering with Victorian clockwork parts, wearing a simple linen blouse and a dark work apron.
Melissa Moretti.color_palette: faded blue, grey, white, soft brown
Melissa Moretti.distinguishing_features: Frequently tinkers with gears, bearings, and springs; vocal advocate for women's education.
Melissa Moretti.faction: Tingen Technical School — Steam and Machinery department student
Melissa Moretti.source_notes: Added specific details about her mechanical hobbies and her reaction to the Shauds' traditionalist views.
Melissa Moretti.unique_identifier: tattered inherited veil cap and self-sewn school bag; brown eyes fixed in a habitual expression of calm exasperation toward her brothers

Mysterious Woman.unique_identifier: face completely obscured by the deep shadows of a black hood
Mysterious Woman.era_clothing_lock: long black hooded robe draped over a dark Victorian dress
Mysterious Woman.face_description: features hidden in darkness, speaks with a hoarse voice
Mysterious Woman.visual_anchor: adult female with face completely obscured by the deep shadows of a black hood, wearing a long black hooded robe draped over a dark Victorian dress
Mysterious Woman.accessories: mottled bronze book with a star-shaped lock
Mysterious Woman.source_notes: Appears in the harbor to hand Tris the Witch potion formula; mostly obscured by her hooded robe.

Black Emperor.unique_identifier: imposing imperial presence from the Fourth Epoch
Black Emperor.era_clothing_lock: majestic black Victorian-style military uniform with elaborate dark gold embroidery and a high collar
Black Emperor.face_description: stern and authoritative face with sharp angular features
Black Emperor.visual_anchor: tall adult male with an imposing imperial presence from the Fourth Epoch, wearing a majestic black Victorian-style military uniform with elaborate dark gold embroidery
Black Emperor.source_notes: Mentioned historically as the ruler of the Solomon Empire.

Blood Emperor.era_clothing_lock: regal crimson velvet mantle over a black Victorian military tailcoat with gold epaulettes, dark trousers, riding boots
Blood Emperor.face_description: majestic and arrogant face with a strong jawline and deep-set commanding eyes
Blood Emperor.visual_anchor: tall athletic pale male with hands permanently stained with blood, wearing a regal crimson velvet mantle over a black Victorian military tailcoat
Blood Emperor.color_palette: deep crimson, gold, black, rusted iron
Blood Emperor.source_notes: Mentioned as the fallen ruler of the Tudor Empire; appearance guessed.

Antigonus.unique_identifier: surrounded by faint spider-like ethereal threads
Antigonus.era_clothing_lock: tattered black Victorian frock coat over an open white shirt, dark formal trousers, bare feet
Antigonus.face_description: partially hidden behind a thick beard and unkempt hair, visible sharp intense eyes
Antigonus.visual_anchor: tall lean pale male surrounded by faint spider-like ethereal threads, wearing a tattered black Victorian frock coat over an open white shirt
Antigonus.color_palette: black, dark grey, pale white, shadow
Antigonus.source_notes: Mentioned as an illustrious name and family of the Fourth Epoch; appearance guessed.

Mr. Zaratul.hair_style: slicked back, long enough to touch the collar
Mr. Zaratul.unique_identifier: mysterious figure who first articulated the 'acting' method for digesting extraordinary potions; described by Roselle as simply 'mysterious Mr. Zaratul'
Mr. Zaratul.era_clothing_lock: long black Victorian frock coat with deep lapels over a dark charcoal waistcoat, crisp white cravat, black wool trousers, polished black Oxford shoes, black leather gloves
Mr. Zaratul.face_description: sharp angular face with high cheekbones, deep-set pale grey eyes under a heavy stern brow, thin lips that rarely betray expression
Mr. Zaratul.visual_anchor: late 40s tall pale male with sharp angular features, silver-white hair slicked back, deep-set pale grey eyes, always in a long black Victorian frock coat with a crisp white cravat and black leather gloves — the mysterious figure who revealed the secret of 'acting' to Roselle
Mr. Zaratul.color_palette: jet black, pale silver, crisp white, charcoal grey
Mr. Zaratul.distinguishing_features: one of the earliest known sources of the 'acting' method for potion digestion; likely an Extraordinary of significant standing
Mr. Zaratul.source_notes: Referenced in Roselle's 26th May diary entry as 'mysterious Mr. Zaratul' who mentioned the concept of acting. No physical description given; all appearance details guessed to match a knowledgeable, enigmatic Victorian-era Extraordinary.

Amon.unique_identifier: wears a crystal monocle on his right eye
Amon.era_clothing_lock: classic Victorian black pointed hat, double-breasted black frock coat, black trousers, dark vest, crisp white shirt
Amon.face_description: sharp facial features, wide forehead, thin lips and calculating gaze
Amon.visual_anchor: late 20s pale male with sharp features wearing a crystal monocle on his right eye, dressed in a classic Victorian black pointed hat and double-breasted black frock coat
Amon.color_palette: black, crystal clear, white, dark grey
Amon.source_notes: Mentioned as an illustrious name of the Fourth Epoch; details guessed based on lore.

Abraham.unique_identifier: carries a star-charted silver pocket watch
Abraham.era_clothing_lock: dark blue tailcoat, silver brocade waistcoat, white cravat, black trousers, leather oxford shoes
Abraham.face_description: scholarly face with soft wrinkles, high cheekbones, and wise observant eyes
Abraham.visual_anchor: older adult male with scholarly wrinkled face carrying a star-charted silver pocket watch, wearing a dark blue tailcoat and silver brocade waistcoat
Abraham.source_notes: Mentioned as an illustrious name of the Fourth Epoch; appearance guessed.

Jacob.unique_identifier: wears a silver ring shaped like a coiled snake on his left index finger
Jacob.era_clothing_lock: charcoal grey morning coat, forest green waistcoat, ascot tie, grey striped trousers, polished leather boots
Jacob.face_description: narrow face with a sharp nose and a calculating, sly gaze
Jacob.visual_anchor: tall lean olive-skinned male wearing a silver coiled snake ring on his left index finger, dressed in a charcoal grey morning coat and forest green waistcoat
Jacob.color_palette: charcoal grey, forest green, silver, dark brown
Jacob.source_notes: Mentioned as an illustrious name of the Fourth Epoch; appearance guessed.

The Hanged Man.face_description: rugged and weathered face hidden by fog
The Hanged Man.visual_anchor: A tall, rugged man in nautical Victorian attire, sitting within the mysterious gray fog.
The Hanged Man.distinguishing_features: The back of his chair above the gray fog features a constellation forming the symbol of 'Storm'.
The Hanged Man.faction: Mandated Punisher or pirate secretly absorbed by the Church of Storms
The Hanged Man.role: Sequence 7 Seafarer or Sequence 8 Guardian of the Storm
The Hanged Man.source_notes: Klein's deductions based on The Hanged Man's recent advancements.
